template: {  "title": "Terminal Velocity",  "description": "A high-stakes action frame capturing a woman sprinting through a crumbling industrial tunnel amidst sparks and chaos.",  "prompt": "You will perform an image edit to create an Ultra-Photorealistic, Movie-Quality action shot.
